title: evansia lacustris
intro: Evansia lacustris, also known as water shield, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. The medicinal properties of Evansia lacustris include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Evansia lacustris are said to include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, Evansia lacustris is often used as a dried leaf or root, and can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions.
